must_find.description: ArbiterVerdict::Escalate is dead code: no mechanism exists for human input in the autonomous pipeline, so Escalate behaves identically to a failure
requires_human() method returns true for Escalate but no caller uses this result to pause the pipeline or notify a human
escalation_summary field on ArbiterDecision is set but never displayed, logged, or acted upon
ArbiterDecision::escalate() constructor and the ESCALATE branch in parse_llm_verdict create decisions that are never meaningfully handled

must_not_flag.description: Proceed and Fix variants are actively used in the pipeline — they are not dead code
The confidence field is used for logging and decision thresholds — it's not dead
